knowledgeBase.title: Balanced breakfast prompt
knowledgeBase.guidance: Begin with protein, fiber, and water to create a steadier start for the day.

knowledgeBase.title: Low-pressure movement plan
knowledgeBase.guidance: Aim for a walk after meals and one focused workout block during the week.

demo-user.name: Jordan Reed
demo-user.dailyRecommendation: Take a 20-minute walk, prep one balanced meal, and log water before dinner.
analysis: Your strongest pattern is staying active in the afternoon.
Meal quality improves on days where hydration is logged early.
Recovery drops when sleep goes below seven hours.

chatbot.message: Hello. I can help with simple nutrition, exercise, and wellness questions.

coach.author: Coach Mira
coach.message: I am here to help turn your goals into a realistic weekly plan.
